profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Update how we greet you and which language you prefer across Vergeo5.
profile.phoneHelp: Your verified mobile number from sign-in.
profile.error: Could not save your profile. Please try again.

addresses.title: Delivery addresses
addresses.description: Save landmark directions and GPS pins for faster checkout.
addresses.count: {count, plural, one {# saved address} other {# saved addresses}}
addresses.emptyBody: Add a landmark and GPS pin so vendors can find you faster.
addresses.label: Label
addresses.landmarkPlaceholder: e.g. Opposite Pick n Pay, Kabulonga
addresses.landmarkHelp: Describe nearby shops, gates, or colours drivers should look for.
addresses.coordsHelp: Drag the pin on the preview or enter coordinates manually.
addresses.gpsDenied: Location access was denied. Enter coordinates manually below.
addresses.gpsUnavailable: Geolocation is not available on this device.
addresses.deleteConfirmBody: This address will be removed from your account. Orders already placed are not affected.
addresses.error: Could not save address. Please try again.

preferences.title: Notification preferences
preferences.description: Choose how Vergeo5 reaches you about orders, tickets, and account updates.
preferences.whatsappHelp: Order updates and delivery alerts on WhatsApp.
preferences.smsHelp: Fallback texts when WhatsApp is unavailable.
preferences.emailHelp: Receipts, security alerts, and marketing if you opt in.
preferences.error: Could not save preferences. Please try again.

privacy.title: Data & privacy
privacy.description: Export or delete your personal data under the Zambia Data Protection Act.
privacy.exportDescription: Download a JSON bundle of your profile, addresses, orders, and reviews.
privacy.exportConfirmBody: We will prepare a download link and notify you when your export is ready. Large accounts may take a few minutes.
privacy.deleteDescription: Permanently remove your login and anonymise personal details.
privacy.deleteConfirmBody: This cannot be undone. Type DELETE MY DATA to confirm, then verify with OTP.
privacy.retentionNote: Orders, payments, and tax records are retained in anonymised form for at least seven years as required by Zambian law. Ledger entries are never deleted.
